title: Sour Chewy Raw-friendly Croatian Colby Jack Cheese Crumble
description: This raw-friendly recipe combines sour pickles with creamy colby jack cheese to create a comforting and chewy crumble that's perfect for breakfast or as a snack.

ingredients.name: Colby Jack Cheese
ingredients.notes: Make sure it’s raw, unpasteurized cheese.

ingredients.name: Sour Pickles
ingredients.notes: Use only pickles labeled as 'raw-friendly' or 'unpasteurized'. Avoid fermented varieties.

instructions: Mix grated Colby Jack cheese and diced sour pickles in a bowl.
Add olive oil, lemon juice, and sea salt to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
Cover and refrigerate for at least an hour before serving.
